summary: Recent B.E. Electronics and Communication Engineering graduate with hands-on experience in UART transactor development, testbench scripting, static timing analysis, and hardware testing internships at Synopsys, Nvidia, and Jabil. Skilled in SystemVerilog, C++, Perl, Python, VCS, and FPGA-based verification, seeking to contribute as a Design Verification Engineer.

experience.title: Technical Engineer Apprentice
bullets: Developed a UART Transactor for the Zebu emulator using C++.
Enhanced protocol functionality for Zebu Transactors using C++.
Created HW/SW testbench backwards compatibility agent and script for Zebu Transactors, incorporating AI-assisted code review.

experience.title: ASIC Engineer Intern (here)
bullets: Performed timing closure and performance optimization for advanced SoC designs using Static Timing Analysis (STA).
Automated STA report analysis with Perl scripts.
Applied manual fixes to resolve clock transition and crosstalk violations.

experience.company: Jabil Circuit India Private Limited Pune
experience.title: Test Engineer Intern (here)
bullets: Conducted functional testing, debugging, and validation of Ericsson’s 5G Radio Transceiver (AIR3268).
Executed SMT assembly processes for Ericsson AIR 3268 transceiver PCBA.
Configured, measured, and calibrated Keysight test equipment for verification tasks.

projects.name: Development and Implementation of a 5G Modem using an FPGA Board
bullets: Implemented FM broadcast and radio functionality using an Adalm-Pluto SDR.
Performed hardware-in-the-loop simulation of FFT on a Kintex-7 KC705 FPGA development board.
Developed Simulink models and FPGA implementation of a 5G transceiver using Vitis Model Composer.

projects.name: Robosoccer Bot
bullets: Built an RC-controlled robot using a laser-cut metal chassis, Sabertooth motor driver, and geared motors.

projects.name: Test Data Compression for System-on-a-Chip Using Huffman Codes April 2024
bullets: Implemented Huffman coding for data compression using Xilinx Vivado.

projects.name: Smart Irrigation System
bullets: Led a group to design a smart irrigation system for flood-irrigated paddy fields using IoT-based solutions.
Utilized ESP-32 microcontroller, nRF24L01 RF module, GSM SIM800A, BME280 sensor, and Thingspeak IoT cloud for monitoring and control.
Worked on water conservation by automating water flow and alerting the farmer about the weather.

education.institution: THAPAR INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY Patiala
